/usr/bin/ar qc libpalloc.a "CMakeFiles/palloc-static.dir/src/alloc.c.o" "CMakeFiles/palloc-static.dir/src/alloc-aligned.c.o" "CMakeFiles/palloc-static.dir/src/alloc-posix.c.o" "CMakeFiles/palloc-static.dir/src/arena.c.o" "CMakeFiles/palloc-static.dir/src/arena_pomai.c.o" "CMakeFiles/palloc-static.dir/src/bitmap.c.o" "CMakeFiles/palloc-static.dir/src/heap.c.o" "CMakeFiles/palloc-static.dir/src/init.c.o" "CMakeFiles/palloc-static.dir/src/libc.c.o" "CMakeFiles/palloc-static.dir/src/options.c.o" "CMakeFiles/palloc-static.dir/src/os.c.o" "CMakeFiles/palloc-static.dir/src/page.c.o" "CMakeFiles/palloc-static.dir/src/random.c.o" "CMakeFiles/palloc-static.dir/src/segment.c.o" "CMakeFiles/palloc-static.dir/src/segment-map.c.o" "CMakeFiles/palloc-static.dir/src/stats.c.o" "CMakeFiles/palloc-static.dir/src/prim/prim.c.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libpalloc.a
